title: OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER - 211info
text: KLAMATH FAMILY WARMING CENTER THRIVE CHURCH OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offering overnight shelter throughout the winter season. 235 S Laguna Street Gymnasium Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Adults 18 and older and families with children under the age of 18, service animals allowed Hours: 7 days per week 6pm-10am, Monday December 1, 2025-Sunday, March 15, 2026 Email (541) 887-4233 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 887-4233 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Ponderosa School Services: Community Shelters Extreme Weather Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
